title: lesquerella purshii
intro: Lesquerella purshii, also known as the desert paintbrush or paintbrush mustard, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant's seeds and leaves have been used in herbal preparations, such as tinctures and infusions, to promote health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving digestion. Lesquerella purshii is also used topically to treat skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, and to support wound healing.
